title: Gladiators 7
writer: Alberto De Martino, Italo Zingarelli, Sandro Continenza
actors: Richard Harrison, Loredana Nusciak, Livio Lorenzon
plot: Framed for the escape of five gladiators from the arena, the son of one of Sparta's leading citizens is sentenced to the arena as gladiator himself and forced to fight for his life in the Roman Colosseum. Years later he manages to...
